title: Mxstry PvP Tweaks
description: PvP Tweaks that make the PvP Experience better.
body:
Vanilla Crystal PvP Pack – Clean Competitive Enhancements
A lightweight PvP resource pack tailored for Crystal PvP, maintaining Minecraft’s Vanilla feel while improving clarity and combat awareness.

Features:
Low Fire – Better visibility during fights

Low Shield – See more while blocking

Bow & Crossbow Stages – Clear pull indicators

Clear Water – Easier underwater visibility

Clear Rain – Less screen clutter

No Enderpearl Sound – No sound when pearling (for Crystal PvP)

No Eating Particles – Clean screen when eating golden apples or carrots

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21-1.21.7 and works well alongside performance mods like Sodium or Iris.
Perfect for competitive PvP players who want a clean, focused experience without losing the Vanilla aesthetic.
